scenario: "Retrieve the top trending recipes from DuckDuckGo, compile a summary table of the ingredients and instructions, and then create a visual infographic for a social media post."
workflow_yaml:
assets:
  trending_recipes_data:
    agent: DuckDuckGoSearchAgent
    description: "Retrieve the top trending recipes from DuckDuckGo"
    type: table
    checks:
      - "row_count > 0"
      - "columns: [recipe_name, url, ingredients, instructions]"
      - "no_empty_values: [recipe_name, ingredients]"

  recipe_summary_table:
    agent: UrlRetrieverAgent
    description: "Compile a summary table of ingredients and instructions from trending recipes"
    type: table
    inputs: [trending_recipes_data]
    checks:
      - "row_count >= trending_recipes_data.row_count"
      - "columns: [recipe_name, ingredients, instructions]"
      - "no_empty_values: [ingredients, instructions]"

  recipe_infographic:
    agent: VisualizationAgent
    description: "Create a visual infographic for social media post"
    type: image
    inputs: [recipe_summary_table]
    checks:
      - "file_size < 5MB"
      - "dimensions: [1080, 1080]"
      - "format: png"

scenario: "Gather user feedback from our website, analyze the text to extract common themes, and produce a summarized report that highlights key insights for team review."
workflow_yaml:
assets:
  user_feedback_text:
    agent: UserInputAgent
    description: "Gather user feedback from our website"
    type: text
    checks:
      - "no_empty_values: [feedback]"
      - "max_length: 500"

  extracted_themes_table:
    agent: NumericalSequencesAgent
    description: "Analyze feedback text to extract common themes"
    type: table
    inputs: [user_feedback_text]
    checks:
      - "row_count > 0"
      - "columns: [theme, frequency]"
      - "no_empty_values: [theme]"

  summarized_report_table:
    agent: AnswererAgent
    description: "Summarize key insights from extracted themes for team review"
    type: table
    inputs: [extracted_themes_table]
    checks:
      - "row_count > 0"
      - "columns: [insight, details]"
      - "no_empty_values: [insight]"
